title: sprint-1: Protocol + identity foundation (governance-first)
description: Wave-1 Discord integrations vertical. Scaffold packages/integrations-core (Effect >=3.21.2<4 peerDep), protocol schemas (provider/envelope/observation/disposition/result/coverage/source) in Effect 3.21.2 idioms, identity.ts (tenantId-scoped key §16.1, canonicalization §17.8), errors.ts, envelope constraints + single Tier §16.10. Green: typecheck/test/build; 0 regressions. Traces PRD FR-1/2, SDD §4/5, §16.1/16.10, §17.5/17.8.

title: sprint-2: Ingestion harness + failure taxonomy
description: IngestionStore (commit + quarantine §17.2) via atomic Ref.modify (sticky first-write §16.4); provider-keyed AdapterRegistry §16.8; telemetry allowlist §11.5/§16.11; ingestUnknown SOLE public boundary §17.4 (ingestEnvelope internal); failure taxonomy §16.3 (Conflict distinct, defects surface, store errors surface); concurrency proof AC-6. Traces PRD FR-3/4, SDD §6, §16.3/16.6, §17.2/17.4.

title: sprint-3: Discord reference adapter
description: Discord adapter: GUILD_MEMBER_ADD→MembershipObserved, UPDATE→MembershipChanged, REMOVE→MembershipRevoked; MESSAGE_CREATE→Ignored; unknown→Quarantined; SchemaError→AdapterContractError. End-to-end proof of committed/duplicate/ignored/quarantined via ingestUnknown. upstreamEventId = transport-assigned delivery id §17.1. Traces PRD FR-7/8/9, AC-4/5, SDD §7, §11.4.

title: sprint-4: Governance artifacts (coverage + evidence)
description: Source manifests (discord.rest/gateway.source.json, verified facts), build-coverage.ts (fail-closed §16.11), coverage/evidence receipts at canonical paths §11.6 (evidence labels spine NON-PRODUCTION §17.6), durable-store ADR + skipped contract-test stub. Traces PRD FR-5/6/11/12, AC-9, INV-5, SDD §8, §16.11, §17.6.

title: sprint-5: Compatibility, identity migration, continuation plan
description: compat.test.ts (medium-registry public API unchanged, AC-2/3), additive integrations-api identity docs (local only, no loa-freeside mutation FR-14), Telegram/Luma continuation plan + trust-boundary/Discord-identity/security continuation items §17.3/17.1/17.7, final whole-workspace green. Traces PRD FR-13/14/15/16, AC-1/2/8/10, SDD §9/13, §17.
